description: All three signer types hold Arc<dyn SigningBackend>, which is Clone. None of the three types implement Clone. Callers who want to share a signer across threads or clone it for use in multiple places cannot do so without extracting and re-wrapping the inner backend. A manual Clone impl is trivial (clone the Arc) and follows the pattern for wrapper types. Locations: Ed25519Signer (line 102), EcdsaP256Signer (line 161), RsaPssSigner (line 224) in /home/mark/PROJECT/crate-secretsx/secretx-signature/src/lib.rs
title: Missing Clone on Ed25519Signer, EcdsaP256Signer, RsaPssSigner
